description: To get started, quickly launch with Atomic Bot Model or choose to set up your own local or remote provider
descriptionWeb: To get started, you'll need to connect to a cloud model using an API key
quickStart: Quick start with Atomic Bot Model
quickStartFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
downloadingDescription: Please wait while we download the model. This may take a few minutes.
turboQuantTagline: Local AI models on your device — blazing fast on average hardware.
modelUnavailable: Not in catalog yet — open Hub after connection.

backendStep.title: Optimize llama.cpp for your GPU
backendStep.description: We can install a faster backend tailored to your hardware. The base CPU build is already bundled — this is the recommended optional upgrade.
backendStep.recommendDesc: We detected a compatible GPU on this device. Downloading the optimal backend will significantly speed up local model inference.
backendStep.downloadingDesc: Fetching the {{backend}} build. This may take a few minutes depending on your connection.
backendStep.restartDesc: The optimal backend has been downloaded. It will activate the next time you start Atomic Chat.
